zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Shaw於1531年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾斯塔福德時，她的父親John Shaw27歲，母親Ellen Empson21歲。她於1554年與Peares Shenton在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾欣克利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1627年在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾申頓享年97歲，埋葬在英國肯特其斯塔波。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Shaw于1531年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾斯塔福德时，她的父亲John Shaw27岁，母亲Ellen Empson21岁。她于1554年与Peares Shenton在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾欣克利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1627年在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾申頓享年97岁，埋葬在英国肯特其斯塔波。

nameMeanings.name: Shaw
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): from Middle English s(c)hawe, s(c)haghe ‘small wood, grove, thicket’ (Old English sceaga). The surname may be topographic, for someone who lived in or by a small wood, or habitational, for someone from any of the many places so named. Shaw and Shawe are most frequent in Lancashire and Yorkshire, where Shaw in Oldham (Lancashire) may be a principal source of the surname. The English and Lowland Scottish surname was also established in Ireland in the 17th century.
Scottish: shortened form of various surnames from the Gaelic personal name Sitheach, derived from sithech ‘wolf’.
Irish (Down and Antrim): adopted for Ó Síthigh ‘descendant of Sítheach’, a personal name based on sítheach ‘peaceful’. Compare Sheehy .

variants.name: Show
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cumberland): probably a variant of Shaw , perhaps representing a blend in Middle English of Old English sceaga and Old Norse skógr, both meaning ‘wood’.
Perhaps an Americanized form of German   Schau  .

variants.name: Sheehy
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, Aisling, Brigid, Declan, Egan, Eoin, Finbar, Ronan.

Irish (Limerick and Kerry): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Síthigh, ‘descendant of Sítheach’, or Mac Síthigh ‘son of Sítheach’, a form of the Irish personal name Síodhach ‘peaceful’, from the adjective sítheach ‘peaceful’ or ‘other worldly’ (see Sheehan ). The noun síth, from which this adjective derives, means basically ‘settlement’, hence both ‘peace’ and ‘place inhabited by other world beings’. This name was established in Ireland from the early 14th century, when a branch of the Scottish McDonnells, descended from Sítheach, great-grandson of Domhnaill, settled in the country.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Shaw was born in 1531, in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Shaw, was 27 and her mother, Ellen Empson, was 21. She married Peares Shenton in 1554, in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died about 1627, in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97, and was buried in Whitstable, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Shaw est née en 1531, à Stafford, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Shaw, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ellen Empson, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Peares Shenton en 1554, à Hinckley, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1627, à Shenton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Whitstable, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Shaw 1531 in Stafford, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Shaw 27 und ihre Mutter Ellen Empson 21. Sie hat 1554 in Hinckley, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Peares Shenton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1627 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Shenton, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Whitstable, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Shaw è nata il nel 1531 nel Stafford, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Shaw, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Ellen Empson, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Peares Shenton nel 1554, nel Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1627, nel Shenton, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 97 anni, e fu sepolta a Whitstable, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Shawが1531年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアスタフォードで生まれた時，父John Shawは27歳，母Ellen Empsonは21歳であった。1554年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアヒンックリーでPeares Shentonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1627年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアシェントンで97歳で死去し，イギリスケントウィトスタブルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Shaw(이)가 1531년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 스태퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Shaw(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Empson(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1554년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 인클리에서 Peares Shenton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1627년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 셰턴에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 휘츠타블일에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Shaw nasceu em 1531, em Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Shaw, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Empson, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Peares Shenton em 1554, em Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1627, em Shenton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Whitstable, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Shaw родилась в 1531 г. в местности стаффорд, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Shaw было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Empson, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peares Shenton в 1554 г. в местности хинккли, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1627 г. в местности шентон, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности уицтабл, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Shaw nació en 1531, en Stafford, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Shaw, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Ellen Empson, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Peares Shenton en 1554, en Hinckley, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió aproximadamente 1627, en Shenton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 97 años, y fue sepultada en Whitstable, Kent, Inglaterra.
